data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for link shortening for booking links, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The linked use case explicitly lists 'Link shortening for booking links' as a need, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that this functionality exists or operates as required. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of link shortening functionality for booking links.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for link shortening functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API can shorten booking links as specified in the use case.
